case_title: AUGUST P MARINO VS. MATT SELIGA

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MATT SELIGA ON OCT-05-2016 - DENIED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AUGUST P. MARINO. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARINO, AUGUST P RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SELIGA, MATT $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $143.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,143.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING - FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST - FILED BY DEFENDANT SELIGA, MATT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $68.90 SERVED MAY-12-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SELIGA, MATT

ORDER ON REQUES TO POSTPONE TRIAL : THE REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS DENIED BECAUSE [X] THE REQUEST WAS NOT FILED AT LEAST 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AND DID NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR THE LATE REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2016 - JUDGMENT.
